text.p: THE CHAIRMAN LOCAL GOVERNMENT AREA STATE
Good day mister Chairman Sir, how is work and family I hope all is well with you, if so we give God all the glory.
My main purpose of writing this letter is to complain about the poor states of our roads in this local government and to inform you of the conseq-uences of it.

Sir, it will interest you to know that 75 per cent of our roads in this local government are in a bad condition. And as a result of that economic activities are not moving on well in our area on like other nabouring local governments where businesses are moving fine. Our roads are very bad, Aaccidents rate is on the increase on a daily bases, a period of six month we recorded fourty six cases of accidents loseing about twentynine lives and it is not good for us as a people in this local government. Our businesses are seriously affected by the roads. Traders and market women are complaining that their businesses are not moving on fine. Road transport workers are taking advantage of the situation to increase the price of transporting goods to areas affected and it is not good for our areas economy. Sir I am plead on behalf of our market women and every one affected for a change and a reabilitation of our roads in the local government.
Sir I understand you have done alot for our community since your administration and I believe you can still do more for our people. And I pray that God protect and preserve you for us in Jesuse Name
